overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path toward a wooden windmill during golden hour. The character passes the windmill and continues through open grassland toward a distant wooden structure, with dramatic sunset lighting and long shadows throughout the journey.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the windmill with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: tall red wooden windmill with rotating blades situated on a grassy hill
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
cluster of white birch trees with green foliage
partly cloudy sky with warm afternoon light

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path toward a prominent red wooden windmill. The path is lined with a rustic wooden fence on the right and birch trees on the left, with warm golden hour sunlight casting long shadows across the grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with dramatic sunset view

events.description: camera pans to reveal bright orange sunset, creating strong backlighting and silhouetting the character against the sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the windmill as the camera pans to capture the dramatic sunset view before resuming forward motion

entered.detail: dramatic orange and pink sunset sky with scattered clouds and visible sun rays
dense line of dark green trees forming the horizon

segments.scene_description: As Geralt passes the windmill, the camera pans to reveal a breathtaking sunset with vibrant orange and pink clouds. The windmill recedes into the left background as the character continues along the path, now strongly backlit by the setting sun.

events.description: distant wooden structure with hanging animal hides becomes visible on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through open grassland toward the distant tree line and wooden structure

entered.detail: simple wooden frame structure with dried animal hides hanging from the crossbeams
small settlement with multiple buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks away from the windmill through open grassland, following the dirt path toward a distant forest. A wooden drying rack with hanging hides appears on the path ahead as the terrain opens up to reveal a small village on the left horizon.

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the wooden structure with hanging hides, maintaining steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: dried animal skins and pelts suspended from the wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a rustic wooden structure used for drying animal hides. The path leads directly toward the wooden frame as the surrounding forest shifts to the right and the structure looms larger in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a sheltered lane with a windmill into a wide, sun-drenched grassland. It begins with Geralt walking toward a prominent red wooden windmill, flanked by a rustic fence and birch trees under the warm glow of golden hour. As he passes the windmill, the camera pans to reveal a breathtaking sunset of vibrant orange and pink clouds, leaving the structure to recede into the background while the character becomes strongly backlit. The scene then opens into expansive grassland as the path leads away from the windmill toward a distant forest and a small village appearing on the left horizon. Finally, the camera tracks forward as the surrounding forest shifts to the right, bringing a rustic wooden drying rack with hanging hides into clear focus in the foreground.
